ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish of the metal sheet (e.g., Galvanized, Stainless 304) */,
  "weight_sq_yard" REAL /* Weight of the metal sheet per square yard */,
  "sheet_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the metal sheet */,
  "nominal_sheet_size" TEXT /* Nominal size of the metal sheet (e.g., 27" x 97") */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., sheet, coil) */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the metal sheet */,
  "material_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the material (e.g., 304, 430 for stainless steel) */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundles" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the bundle */,
  "sheets_per_bundle" INTEGER /* Number of sheets per bundle */,
  "bundles_per_pallet" INTEGER /* Number of bundles per pallet */,
  "pallet_weight" REAL /* Weight of the pallet */,
  "bundle_type" TEXT /* Type of the bundle (e.g., standard, custom) */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the bundle was created */,
  "quality_check_status" TEXT /* Quality check status of the bundle */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the bundle is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundles_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundles_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "warehouse_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager responsible for the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse from which the order will be shipped */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who processed the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipper responsible for the shipment */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of the customer (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager responsible for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
